title: senecio hastatus
intro: Senecio hastatus, also known as Groundsel, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family native to Europe, Asia, and Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Groundsel include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and reduce blood sugar levels. Groundsel can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
